And I do suggest you take it with food because it will help the absorption of the ingredients in the product. Four, cycling, stopping or starting. With this type of product, it's typical to see that when testosterone boosting products that you do need to take time off, in this product you do not. You can in fact go into a sort of blasting and cruising style dosage regimen where you take a serving per day and then during times of intense training or competition, you just double your dose during those time periods. So you consume normal amounts and then increase your normal, you're from your normal amounts for short time periods and then go back to your cruise levels again. And then lastly, what happens if you skip a dose? You can definitely double up doses so long as you don't mind swallowing a few more tablets. No problem.
